  "findings": [
    "Insufficient concrete cover due to reinforcing steel touching the formwork and ground."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reposition rebar using approved concrete dobies, plastic chairs, or spacers to achieve specified clearance before concrete placement.",
    "Re-inspect rebar clearance and secure tie wires to prevent shifting during pour."
  ],
  "rationale": "Rebar touching the formwork or ground violates the minimum concrete cover requirements of ACI 318 and ACI 117, exposing the reinforcement to moisture, corrosion, and structural degradation.",

    "ACI 318 Section 20.6 (Concrete Cover Requirements)",
    "ACI 117 (Standard Specifications for Tolerances for Concrete Construction and Materials)"
  ]
